title: lysimachia remota
intro: Lysimachia remota, also known as Chinese Viper's Bugloss, is a plant species native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to stimulate the immune system and improve circulation. The health benefits of Lysimachia remota include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism and arthritis, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and made into a tea or tincture, or used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
